zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Morgan於1180年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比時，她的父親Father Morgan25歲，母親Mrs. Father Morgan24歲。她和George Gates至少有1個兒子。她去世在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Morgan was born in 1180, in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Father Morgan, was 25 and her mother, Mrs. Father Morgan, was 24. She had at least 1 son with George Gates. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances Morgan est née en 1180, à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Father Morgan, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Father Morgan, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec George Gates. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Frances Morgan 1180 in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Father Morgan 25 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Father Morgan 24. Sie hatte mit George Gates mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

ja.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: イギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビー

ko.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Frances Morgan(이)가 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Father Morgan(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Father Morgan(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 George Gates(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances Morgan родилась в 1180 г. в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Father Morgan было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Father Morgan, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от George Gates. Она умерла в её родном городе.
